title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI to accelerate software development, with teams deploying code daily and completing a large Java migration 6 times faster. The company projects it could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 through AI adoption.
